pre_task_context:
You need to submit PRs to UnsafeLabs/Bounty-Hunters for Solidity/DeFi crypto bounties. These are high-value bounties ($200-$900 each).

IMPORTANT RULES:
- Write commit messages like a human - casual, short
- Use `git commit -s` for DCO
- Do NOT add AI co-author trailers
- Do NOT mention AI tools in PRs
- Write natural PR descriptions

The repo is at https://github.com/UnsafeLabs/Bounty-Hunters
Solidity contracts are in solidity/contracts/

You need to fix these 5 issues (pick the ones that don't already have PRs):

1. #920: Fix cross-chain replay attack in CrossChainBridge ($900)
   - Add block.chainid to signed message hash
   - Add nonce per sender
   - Include contract address in hash
   - Check for zero-address return from ecrecover

2. #916: Fix MultiSigWallet confirmation race condition ($800)
   - Check the issue body for details

3. #912: Fix tx.origin phishing in GovernanceToken ($700)
   - Check the issue body for details

4. #918: Fix first-depositor price manipulation in LiquidityPool ($600)
   - Add MINIMUM_LIQUIDITY = 1000 lock on first deposit
   - Fix removeLiquidity to use internal accounting

5. #914: Fix phantom reward accrual in YieldVault ($550)
   - Check the issue body for details

For each issue:
1. `gh issue view NUMBER --repo UnsafeLabs/Bounty-Hunters --json body --jq '.body'` to get full details
2. Read the Solidity contract from the repo
3. Fork the repo, clone it
4. Fix the vulnerability in the Solidity contract
5. Add tests if possible
6. Create a PR with the fix
7. Comment on the issue with the PR link

Git config:
- email: gautamkumarofficial@users.noreply.github.com
- name: Gautam Kumar

Work in /tmp for each repo. Clean up after each.

After completing all 5, report back with:
- How many PRs were created
- The PR URLs
- Any issues encountered
